title: Minky V Mop For Cleaning Floor Refill Pack | Microfiber Floor Mop | Mop Head Replacement | | Dust Wet Mop | Reusable Pads | Floor Mops For Hardwood Floors| Cleaning Products
features: MICROFIBRE TECHNOLOGY - Our microfiber pad is made up of 3 different fiber strands to absorb, collect and trap dirt particles as well as remove stubborn marks. The action pad is also non-scratch
MULTI PURPOSE - The use of super soft microfibers attract and trap even the smaller particles, this allows the action pad to double as a duster meaning it can be used both wet and dry.
DESIGNED FOR MAXIMUM PERFORMANCE - Made from 3 different fiber strands to ensure effective, easy mopping. Our Minky mops are designed and crafted to be resilient and strong cleaning tools
USE ANYWHERE - Our Minky mop has been designed with versatility in mind, it can be used on most hard wood floors around the house. The shape of the mop head allows it to get into all tight corners
EASY TO USE - Our Minky mop is designed to be light weight, allowing it to be easy to maneuver and operate
description: Product Description The V mop refill can be easily attached by simply removing the old head and clicking the new head into place. Box Contains Minky V Mop Refill
